subject: Reset your Mentora password
title: Reset your password
intro: Hi{{namePart}}, use the code below to reset your Mentora password. It expires in 30 minutes and can only be used once.
footerNote: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.
plainTextBody: Your Mentora password reset code is {{code}}. It expires in 30 minutes.
